recommendations.title: Angel of Mine
recommendations.overview: A woman grieving over the death of her daughter loses grip of reality when she begins to think her girl may still be alive.

recommendations.title: Lady Snowblood

recommendations.title: Hours
recommendations.overview: A father struggles to keep his infant daughter alive in the wake of Hurricane Katrina.

recommendations.title: Unknown
recommendations.overview: Five men wake up in a locked-down warehouse with no memory of who they are. They are forced to figure out who is good and who is bad to stay alive.

recommendations.title: La Grande Bouffe
recommendations.overview: Four friends gather at a villa with the intention of eating themselves to death.
